channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Someone left old fridge on pavement, 23rd April
item.description:
On 22nd April 2026 during the day someone left this old appliance/fridge on the pavement in front of 7 Beaconsfield Road, Mottingham. We did not see this happening, however some neighbours that have camera might be able to help. Kindly ask to collect. Thank you, resident of 7 Beaconsfield Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubish left behind from one of the garage owner, 23rd April
item.description:
Rubbish left behind

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silver Spring Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car for 2 years, 23rd April
item.description:
This car has been abandoned in our car park for 2 years. There has been no movement with the vehicle ever since.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensgate Mews, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue plastic piping foldable chair and a traffic Ballard, 23rd April
item.description:
Been there for awhile

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 191, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In parking bay outside 39 Dartmouth Road, 23rd April
item.description:
Potholes were fixed in nearby roundabout and it looks like the contractors dumped and left this old tarmac and material here. It’s been here for more than a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dartmouth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Abandoned untaxed vehicle, 23rd April
item.description:
This black mazda has been parked here in front of my drive for over 3 weeks. It obstructs getting in and out of my driveway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walden Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fridge to the right of Gordon road., 23rd April
item.description:
Another example of daily fly tipping on this stretch of land

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General rubbish, 23rd April
item.description:
I reported lots of general waste in the road and on the pavement, including a bin of excrement and soiled tissues yesterday. It came up today as fixed. I have just walked down this street and everything is still there. NOTHING HAS BEEN FIXED. I put an update on my origin report, but as this doesn't get sent to the council I am making a new report and hope that it will get sorted. It is not good enough to just say fixed and not do anything about it. It is a health hazard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyer posting, 23rd April
item.description:
I recd about 40 of the same 2 pamphlets pushed through my door even though my door says no junk mail. Littering and waste!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New bins, 23rd April
item.description:
During my lunch breaks I have noticed how the position of the new bins seems a little awkward for pedestrians - why not at least turn them by 90 degrees so as not to present such a wide obstacle or, I think better still, place them by a column.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There a sticker saying ‘hilter youth’on the traffic way at the beginning for Village Way, 23rd April
item.description:
The sticker indirectly supported nazism and is horrible It needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Village Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There a sticker saying ‘hilter youth’on the traffic way at the beginning for Village Way, 23rd April

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Against the raised bed in square at junction of Tennyson road and priory park road, 23rd April
item.description:
Two slabs see photo of stone worktop? Dumped against raised bed. So heavy can't move

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London

item.title: Large branch broken and left on pavement, 23rd April
item.description:
I moved the large branch to the front of drive today in the hope the green waste truck would remove. However left behind. This is left on the pavement outside my house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastview Avenue, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Racist graffiti on postbox, 23rd April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Breakspears Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.title: Litter covered path, 23rd April
